tagline: Enjoy stress-free pool ownership with a service and maintenance team you can count on

hero.headline: Madison's Most Reliable Pool Care Team
hero.subheadline: While other companies ghost your calls, our award-winning technicians show up on time with fully stocked trucks and 10-30 years of experience. We handle the chemicals, the equipment, the headaches -- so you just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Southern Wisconsin
services.subtitle: From seasonal openings to emergency repairs, our PHTA-certified team handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can reclaim your free time.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal startup and winterization done right. We remove safety covers, fire up equipment, balance chemistry, and button everything up for winter -- protecting your investment year-round.

cards.title: Weekly & Bi-Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive care with digital reporting through your customer portal. Water testing, chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming -- you track everything online.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Premium liner installation from Merlin Industries, Latham, and TARA. Free estimates on every project. Transform your pool's look in as little as one day.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Heaters, pumps, filters, salt systems, automation controls -- diagnosed and repaired on-site from our fully stocked service vehicles. Most fixes completed same-visit.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Services
cards.description: Year-round hot tub maintenance, repair, and water care to keep your spa running perfectly through every Wisconsin season.

cards.title: Auto Cover & Commercial
cards.description: Automatic pool cover installation and repair plus full commercial services for HOAs, businesses, and municipal facilities across southern Wisconsin.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool. Unlike other Madison companies, we actually answer the phone -- and we'll have an honest, no-pressure estimate to you within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Show Up Prepared
steps.description: Our experienced technicians arrive on schedule in fully stocked service vehicles. Opening, closing, maintenance, repairs -- everything handled professionally with digital reporting.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool All Season
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready. Track water quality through your customer portal, and rest easy knowing our 1-year workmanship warranty has you covered.

about.label: Why Madison Trusts New Wave
about.headline: The Pool Company That Actually Calls You Back
about.description: Since 2013, New Wave Pools has been the team southern Wisconsin pool owners rely on. Our 11 dedicated professionals bring 10 to 30 years of hands-on experience, and our fleet of fully stocked service vehicles means we arrive ready to solve problems -- not order parts. We've earned multiple industry awards including the Guildmaster Honor for Service Excellence and the APSP Superior Service Award because we believe every homeowner deserves a pool company that shows up, communicates clearly, and stands behind their work.

features.title: 10-30 Years Experience Per Tech
features.description: Every lead technician brings a minimum of a decade in the pool industry. Many have 20-30 years serving southern Wisconsin pools specifically.

features.title: 1-Year Workmanship Warranty
features.description: We stand behind every job with a full one-year warranty and satisfaction guarantee. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it -- no charge.

features.title: Digital Reporting & Portal Access
features.description: Track your pool's water quality and service history online anytime. Full transparency with every visit, right from your phone.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different, so we provide honest custom quotes. No hidden fees, no upselling -- just fair pricing for expert care.

guarantee.headline: Our Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no additional cost. Every job is backed by our one-year workmanship warranty. We've built our reputation on doing things right -- and 136 five-star reviews prove it.

faqs.question: How quickly can you schedule my first service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent repairs or green pool situations, we offer priority scheduling. Call us at 608-444-8850 and we'll work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. After each visit, you'll receive a digital report through your customer portal so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What certifications do your technicians hold?
faqs.answer: Our team is certified through the Pool & Hot Tub Alliance (PHTA), APSP, and NSPF. We've also earned the Guildmaster Honor for Service Excellence and multiple Superior Service Awards from the Midwest Chapter of APSP.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on your work?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every job comes with our one-year workmanship warranty and full satisfaction guarantee. We're also fully insured for your peace of mind. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it at no charge.

faqs.question: What areas do you service?
faqs.answer: We serve all of southern Wisconsin including Madison, Sun Prairie, Middleton, Verona, Cottage Grove, Stoughton, Lake Mills, Chenequa, and surrounding communities. Call us to confirm coverage in your area.

testimonials.name: Larry T.
testimonials.text: We called every pool place in greater Madison. None even called us back. Except New Wave -- we were very relieved. They've been outstanding ever since.

testimonials.name: Jack H.
testimonials.text: I have NEVER had a problem with them. We will never use any other company but New Wave. Reliable, professional, and they truly know pools inside and out.

testimonials.name: Amanda K.
testimonials.text: We love them! New Wave Pools is prompt, efficient, reasonable, and professional. They make pool ownership completely stress-free for our family.

benefits: Free pool inspection with every estimate
